title: Apricot Stir Fry with Citrus Cream Sauce
description: A creamy and indulgent Indian-inspired stir fry dish featuring apricots and a citrus-infused cream sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ginger and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add diced apricot and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together citrusy, creamy, and stir spices.
Pour the citrus-cream sauce over the apricot mixture and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over basmati rice or with naan bread.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
